positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical celestial botanical mandala design. The central subject features a stylized, glowing crescent moon framed by intertwining, ornate jungle florals (peonies, jasmine, tropical leaves) and cosmic vines. Incorporate delicate constellations, stylized nebulas, and geometric stellar patterns as ethereal accents. The style should be a fusion of Art Deco engraving and modern psychedelic linework, optimized for clean, strong silhouettes and central composition, suitable for high-contrast apparel printing. Use a rich, deep color palette of midnight sapphire, emerald green, and ethereal gold, with exceptional depth and detail. Vector illustration, ornamental, intricate pattern.
